channel.title: Vox Language Updates
channel.description: Changelog, release notes, and documentation updates for the Vox AI-native programming language, maintained by the Vox Foundation.

item.title: Redirect
item.description: Redirect

item.title: Redirect: vox-gamify
item.description: Redirect: vox-gamify

item.title: Vox Developer User Journeys: Intent vs. Actualization
item.description: Baseline target workflows mapping how real human developers interface with the Vox orchestrator system.

item.title: Completion policy SSOT (LLM premature-completion)
item.description: Single source of truth for LLM completion policy enforcement, TOESTUB integration, and CI gating.

item.title: English-Core + Latin Alias Migration Ledger
item.description: Complete migration tracking for nomenclature transition from Latin aliases (vox-dei, vox-ars) to English canonical names.

item.title: Vox Memory System
item.description: Persistent, searchable long-term storage architecture for agent knowledge with three-layer design.

item.title: News syndication: incident patterns and mitigations
item.description: Searchable SSOT for automated outbound publishing failure modes and Vox-specific safety controls.

item.title: Unified News Syndication Security & Safety
item.description: Safety mechanisms and architectural constraints preventing accidental automated social media posts.

item.title: 2026 State-of-the-Art: Dynamic Agentic Planning & Orchestration
item.description: Research synthesis on LLM agent planning, context management, workflow orchestration, and state persistence.

item.title: Vox Security Model
item.description: Multi-layer protection against prompt injection, scope violations, and unauthorized access via SecurityPolicy and SecurityGuard.

item.title: Vox Session Management
item.description: Persistent conversation history, metadata, and state management across agent interactions.

item.title: Vox Architectural Organization & Governance
item.description: Strict organizational principles enforced via vox architect command and TOESTUB reasoning engine.

item.title: Vox Agentic Loop Overhaul + MENS Syntax-Intelligence Blueprint
item.description: 254-task implementation blueprint covering OOPAV agent loop, MENS grammar-aware training, and GRPO reinforcement learning.

item.title: Vox VS Code Extension — Frontend Redesign Research (2026)
item.description: Research substrate for Industrial Cyber-Renaissance reskin using v0.dev workflow and React-based webview architecture.

item.title: Glossary: Vox Terminology
item.description: Authoritative vocabulary for the Vox language, runtime, and AI orchestration ecosystem.

item.title: The Why: Zero-Hallucination Design
item.description: Why Python and TypeScript fail for LLM code generation, and how the Vox compiler solves the hallucination boundary.

item.title: How-To: Build AI Agents and MCP Tools
item.description: Expand your Vox logic into reusable tools for AI assistants and define specialized agents using the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

item.title: Vox: The AI-Native Programming Language
item.description: Vox is an AI-native full-stack language that eliminates hallucinations via compiler-enforced reality. Compiles to Rust and TypeScript with zero-null discipline.

item.title: Installation Reference
item.description: Authoritative guide for installing the Vox CLI, toolchain, and AI provider backends across Windows, macOS, and Linux.

item.title: Reference: Type System
item.description: Deep dive into the Vox type system: ADTs, generics, zero-null discipline, and bidirectional inference.

item.title: v0.8.0 — @require, @pure, @deprecated Decorators; 10 LSP Features
item.description: Added @require, @pure, and @deprecated decorators. Implemented 10 Language Server Protocol features including hover, go-to-definition, and inline diagnostics.

item.title: v0.7.0 — QLoRA Training Pipeline; Socrates Anti-Hallucination Protocol
item.description: Native QLoRA fine-tuning via Candle and qlora-rs. Socrates confidence protocol integrated into the orchestrator for anti-hallucination validation of agent outputs.

item.title: v0.6.0 — Mens Transport; Durable Workflow Runtime MVP
item.description: CPU-first mens registry with optional HTTP control plane. Interpreted workflow runtime MVP supporting local and mens activity hooks.
